sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Intro, Cinematic Strings, Ethereal Vocal Layering]
The fields are bare, the rivers run dry
The fig trees fade beneath a broken sky
Yet in the hush, I hear a sound
A whisper soft, where hope is found
[Verse 1]
The vineyards wither, no harvest remains
The olive groves stand in silent pain
The flocks have vanished from the fold
Yet still, my heart sings brave and bold
[Chorus, Sweeping Strings, Emotional Lift]
Yet I will rejoice in the storm, in the night
Dance on the heights though there's no end in sight
For love is my strength, my unshaken light
I rise, I rise, on the wings of delight
[Verse 2]
The earth may tremble, the heavens may weep
Darkness may drown the valleys deep
Yet even here, in the dust and ash
A song still burns, it will not pass
[Bridge, Instrumental Swell, Angelic Harmonies]
He lifts me high, my soul takes flight
Like deer that leap in morning light
Above the sorrow, beyond the past
In His embrace, I’m free at last
[Verse 3, Reflective, Building Tension]
The days may wander, the nights may be long
But love keeps writing a steadfast song
Not by sight, but faith alone
I know my steps are leading home
[Chorus, Powerful Reprise]
Yet I will rejoice in the storm, in the night
Dance on the heights though there's no end in sight
For love is my strength, my unshaken light
I rise, I rise, on the wings of delight
[Outro, Soft Fade, Dreamlike Echoes]
The fields are bare, the rivers run dry
Yet still, my soul will testify
For joy is here, though none can see
A song of hope inside of me
